ast.name: desc
ast.source: Open Obsidian automatically whenever you log into your computer.
ast.target: 登录电脑时自动打开 Obsidian。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Minimises Obsidian automatically whenever the app is launched. If the
      "Run in background" option is enabled, windows will be hidden to the system
      tray/menubar instead of minimised to the taskbar/dock.
ast.target:
启动应用时自动最小化 Obsidian。如果启用了
      “在后台运行”选项，窗口将被隐藏到系统
      托盘/菜单栏，而不是最小化到任务栏/程序坞。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Hides the app and continues to run it in the background instead of quitting
      it when pressing the window close button or toggle focus hotkey.
ast.target:
按下窗口关闭按钮或切换焦点快捷键时，隐藏应用并继续在后台运行，
      而不是退出应用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Hides the window's icon from from the dock/taskbar. Enabling the tray icon first
      is recommended if using this option. This may not work on Linux-based OSes.
ast.target:
从程序坞/任务栏隐藏窗口图标。如果使用此选项，建议先启用托盘图标。
      这在基于 Linux 的操作系统上可能不起作用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Adds an icon to your system tray/menubar to bring hidden Obsidian windows
      back into focus on click or force a full quit/relaunch of the app through
      the right-click menu.
ast.target:
在系统托盘/菜单栏添加一个图标，点击可将隐藏的 Obsidian 窗口
      重新聚焦，或通过右键菜单强制完全退出/重启应用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Set the image used by the tray/menubar icon. Recommended size: 16x16
Preview:
ast.target:
设置托盘/菜单栏图标使用的图像。推荐尺寸：16x16
预览：

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Set a title to identify the tray/menubar icon by. The {{vault}} placeholder will be replaced by the vault name.
Preview:
ast.target:
设置一个标题以标识托盘/菜单栏图标。 {{vault}} 占位符将被替换为保险库名称。
预览：

ast.name: desc
ast.source: New quick notes will be placed in this folder.
ast.target: 新的快速笔记将放置在此文件夹中。
